message: I decided to check the SAWAYAKA message board from the computer at my house.
Until now, I always felt like doing this went against my mother's will.
So I never did anything like this in my house.
But now it's different.
This doesn't go against my mother's will... It was all planned by my mother before she died.
Everything is pre-established harmony.
All events appear to be independent and mutually unrelated to each other.
And they truly are.
My mother's will is materialized in this world as both the force and the effect.
It is an infinitely small, simple, indivisible substance, and... an infinite number of them make up the world.
The effect of my mother's will is representation, and there is both a dark side and a light side to that representation.
Those things that are represented by the dark side of my mother's will are physical.
The light side of the representation of my mother's will is mental or spiritual.
The transition between the light and dark sides of my mother's will is continuous.
That's the important part.
Each piece of my mother's will is a windowless monad that doesn't interact with any of the others, but the clarity of each one illuminates the universe.
Just like two synchronized clocks...
It's pre-established harmony, established by my mother at the time of the world's creation.
The world advances in accordance with my mother's program.
Therefore, my mother knows everything in the world.
My mother knew everything.
Of course, she also knew everything about me.
That I only pretended to be diligent while I was at the house.
That I was disgusting when I wasn't at home.
Even though she knew, she acted as if she didn't.
I was a diligent child at home.
That's how I acted.
I didn't think she noticed.
I never brought anything vulgar into the house.
I didn't bring anything perverted into the house.
I didn't masturbate in the house.
But when I wasn't at home, I was vulgarity itself.
I did nothing but masturbate in my secret base.
Sleeping or masturbating.
In my newest base, I even had Internet.

I would browse the Internet, masturbate, get tired, sleep, browse the Internet, masturbate, get tired, sleep, eat, browse the Internet, masturbate, get tired, and sleep. That's all I would ever do in a day.
My mother knew.
She knew everything.
That every time I was on the Internet I was downloading pornographic movies or pictures.
I used P2P software to illegally download pornography, then I masturbated over and over, every single day.
I was filth.
It was all predetermined.

While I masturbated, I loved to imagine myself dressed as a girl and raping beautiful women, or sometimes myself dressed as a girl being raped by a futanari (though I would never want to do it with a guy).
That I had a notebook where I drew pictures like that myself.
My mother knew everything.
That too was predetermined.
In a way, it was even my mother's will that I masturbated all day long.
Now I understand.
That wasn't even my will.
So then...
What was it all for?
The reason why I masturbated so much...
The reason I can't stop masturbating...
There should be a reason for that.

name: Takuji
message: "There are still many things I don't understand. There are still many riddles to solve."

name: Takuji
message: "It looks like it will take a little longer for me to comprehend my mother's will, to completely comprehend God's will."
I checked my computer.
Whether it was sending the curse mail to those three every hour.
Whether the countdown messages were being sent to all the others.
And what they were talking about on the underground message board.

She doesn't have any fear at all.
Earlier, she seemed really interested when she was asking Yokoyama Kiyoshi about this site.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... Go ahead, then. But registering on this site means..."

name: Takuji

1: Anonymous Kita High Student: 2012/07/13(M) 18:52:25 ID:MARUKOME
This is a thread for everyone to discuss the mail they're getting from Takashima Zakuro.
Previous thread
I got something weird (||||▽￣)」 scary
The thread kept on getting longer.
There were still a lot of people trolling, but the truth is, even they were starting to get scared.
Hehehe... You can't fool me. I can see your fear as clear as day.
I know much better than any of you what fear is.
After all, I've lived my life in fear.
I know better than anyone that they're just making jokes to hide their fear.

name: Takuji
message: "Even though the events are all separate... they look as if they're connected."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Fear overtakes them."

name: Takuji
message: "These two look especially delicious."
Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko.
They were using their real names even though it's an anonymous site, and they both insisted that the messages were being sent from Takashima-san's phone.
They insisted that the messages were Takashima Zakuro's curse.
Don't tell me you're losing your heads already.
And Tachibana Kimika... She's doing great.
She wasn't posting with her real name, but she had been fanning the flames ever since the incident.
She insisted that this was Takashima's curse... That all humans will die from Takashima's curse.

name: Takuji
message: "Though..."
When I investigated, I realized that she really was the one doing almost all the work scaring people.
She started the thread too.
She could post as much as she wanted for all I cared, since it's all anonymous, but...

name: Takuji
message: "Why's that?"
I felt a bit uneasy about Tachibana Kimika.
Why is she riling people up?
Is it because of her own fear?
That was the most logical explanation.
But something seemed amiss.

name: Takuji
message: "Well, whatever. I might as well leave her alone, since she's helping me."
Now there was there nigh unto the mountains a great herd of swine feeding. And all the devils besought him, saying, Send us into the swine, that we may enter into them.
And forthwith Jesus gave them leave.
And the unclean spirits went out, and entered into the swine: and the herd ran violently down a steep place into the sea, (they were about two thousand;) and were choked in the sea.
Hehehehe... They're just like pigs. They'll run down a steep place into the sea and be choked by the water.
Just like that... They grow fearful as they head toward destruction.

name: Takuji
message: "But still..."
Maybe I should've expected this, since she's a teacher, but Senagawa doesn't seem upset so far, and she hasn't posted on the message board at all.
Or maybe it has nothing to do with her being a teacher and she's just that strong-willed.
Admitting her fear would be the same as admitting her crime.
So she tells herself...
"That was just an accident."
"It's not like I had a hand in Takashima Zakuro's bullying."
She must be silently enduring her fear, since she wants to believe herself innocent.

Maybe I should make her a sacrifice...
In my first ritual to become the savior.

message: "And they that fed the swine fled, and told it in the city, and in the country..."

name: Takuji
message: "And they went out to see what it was that was done. And they come to Jesus, and see him that was possessed with the devil, and had the legion, sitting, and clothed, and in his right mind: and they were afraid..."

name: Takuji
message: "And they that saw it told them how it befell to him that was possessed with the devil, and also concerning the swine..."
That's right. Christ became their savior by showing the people several miracles. In order for me to become the true savior, I too must show the people several miracles.
For that, a sacrifice is necessary.
A sacrifice in order to cause a miracle.
Just like the pigs jumping into the ocean...
A sacrifice is necessary.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Another day begins for the savior. It begins... Hahahahaha."
I composed a new message on Takashima-san's cell phone.
It was a prophecy from Takashima-san.
No, for them, it would surely be a curse.
from: Takashima Zakuro
subject: no subject
blood will pour from the head
blood will pour from another head
blood will flow
blood will flow again today
their head will be covered in blood
A prophecy from Takashima-san.
For them, a curse.
But to me, it was something different.
It was the first step in securing Senagawa as a sacrifice.
I have to do it myself.
That woman will bleed.
She will bleed as... a symbol, so that they will know she was a sacrifice.
That will be the moment of the savior's birth.

name: Takuji
message: "Now then, I should go to school."
I entered the classroom.
Not silently through the back door, but boldly...
Huh...?
Numada and Nishimura were looking at me.
Huh?
Hehehe... They both looked away when we met eyes.
Are they afraid of me?
Am I that scary now?
I looked for Yuuki.

name: Takuji
message: "That bastard Yuuki... I guess he didn't come to school today. Well, I can't blame him after yesterday."
That's probably the reason those two are afraid of me too.
I can understand why they would be afraid of me after I beat up Yuuki that badly.
But...
For some reason, there are other people who look like they're afraid of me. Why?
Do the rest of them know what happened to Yuuki too?
Well... Who cares?
I sat at my desk.
It was in the back row.
From here, I could see everyone else in the class.

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, that's right."
Why didn't I notice before?
There's no one behind me.
I'm hardly ever in the classroom, and I'm always sweating in fear when I am, so I never noticed before.

name: Takuji
message: "But still..."
Unlike yesterday, no one was talking about Takashima-san or the end of the world.
It sounded like they were just casually chatting.
Of course, it only looked like that on the outside.
When I looked more closely, a lot of the people in the classroom were acting differently.
Strange conversations, strange smiles...
Most of them were the people registered on the underground message board.
The people who aren't registered thought of that as old news.
They were talking about celebrities, stuff on TV... Pointless stuff like that.
But Takashima-san was the only thing on the minds of people registered on the message board.
The curse mail came from Takashima-san every morning.
The countdown until the end of the world.
Just look, he's as pale as a ghost.
A girl hid her phone under her desk as she pounded away at the buttons.
Normally, she would be smiling and sending messages to her friends or maybe her boyfriend.
But look at her expression.
Her face is drained of color, and she's intently focused on her phone. What a tragedy.
Why would someone be looking at their phone so intently with such a pale face?
Hehehehe... It's not hard to figure any of them out.
As I watched them, they kept checking their phones, one after the other.

name: Takuji

The time is set to... just before class starts.

The sound of vibrating phones echoed in the room.
The sound increased as more and more phones started vibrating.
The owner's face grew pale every time.

That idiot posted about it on the underground message board.
"Even if you change your email address, the curse mail will follow you."
Of course, there were people who stayed calm and denied it, but there were so many more people in a panic that the reasonable opinions were ignored.
Now they're saying, "Apparently, once you get the curse mail, it will follow you forever."
As the person sending the messages, it was kind of pathetic how they prefaced that statement with "apparently"... The rumors seemed to change every day.
I couldn't even keep track of all the rumors anymore.

Soon they were saying that the curse mail would follow you even if you change your email address, and if you throw your phone away, she'll leave the messages on your home phone's answering machine instead.
That's impossible...

message: "Haha, so you intend to use violence because you can't win with logic?"
No one could understand what had just happened.
Just that a loud sound echoed through the classroom, and then the teacher fell down, covered in blood.
They were too confused to understand that I had just struck the teacher with a flower vase.
Because...

name: Female Student
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Female Student
message: "I-It's just like the email said."

name: Yuki
message: "Email?"
It was different than I had planned.
I was intending on making Senagawa bleed.
I intended to make her the sacrifice.
I just went with the flow.
But now Takashima Zakuro's curse mail had claimed another victim.
The prediction was...
blood will pour from the head
blood will pour from another head
blood will flow
blood will flow again today
their head will be covered in blood
This too was predetermined.

name: Female Student
message: "Aaaaahh!"
Someone screamed, sending the rest of the class into a panic.

name: Male Student
message: "Wh-What just..."

name: Male Student
message: "Is... Is he dead?"
They made a lot of noise over the collapsed teacher, but no one did anything to me except sneak glances from the corners of their eyes.
They're too afraid to look at the classroom's new ruler.
Hehehehe... It's diverged quite a lot from my plan.
Oh well.
I took the opportunity.
Now it is time for the savior's sermon.
The savior's first sermon begins now!
It begins!

name: Takuji
message: "What's wrong? You seem awfully scared of something."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji! You son of a..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, if it isn't Minakami-san."

name: Takuji
message: "It would appear you're no better than the rest of the poor little lambs here."

name: Takuji
message: "Your heart is thick with fear."

name: Takuji
message: "You should just stand back and watch in fear, like you've been doing."

name: Takuji
message: "And then you shall feel the flames of hell licking at your flesh."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya..."

name: Takuji
message: "What, are you going to hit me?"

name: Takuji
message: "You're going to bully me, just like Yuuki Tomosane and the rest of humanity have?!"

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Mark my words, all ye who quiver in fear."

name: Takuji
message: "All life shall end on the 20th! That is the absolute truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "Both Shiroyama and Takashima died for this truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "Death, that is the message of prophecy!"

name: Takuji
message: "Death, that is the absolute truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "Why is death the message that leads to prophecy?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because the foolish attempt to conceal death!"

name: Takuji
message: "So we must speak of that which is concealed!"

name: Takuji
message: "That which conceals death! The first is education! The second is the media!"

name: Takuji
message: "In countries such as this, mandatory education has become commonplace. In our society, the media has swelled and transformed into the highest authority in the world!"

name: Takuji
message: "We have a host of taboos implanted into our minds by public education and through the mass media."

name: Takuji
message: "The greatest taboo of all is to think upon death!"

name: Takuji
message: "We have put aside any thought of death! We are obliged to act as if our daily lives will continue for eternity!"

name: Takuji
message: "And the reason is because everything is powerless, everything is meaningless before the unreasoning specter of death!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's why education and the media try to disguise the true meaning of death!"

name: Takuji
message: "The death they intimate to us is but a phantasm on the far shores, something with which we have no relation. It has been reduced to a mere toy, something you can enjoy without worrying that it may ever strike you."

name: Takuji
message: "But the reality that everyone knows is that every single day, death creeps ever closer to all the people on the planet. Death is reality itself."

name: Iida
message: "M-Mamiya... You..."

name: Female Student
message: "Mr. Iida!"

name: Female Student
message: "H-He's okay..."

name: Iida
message: "You're wrong..."

name: Takuji
message: "What have I said that's wrong?"

name: Iida
message: "That religious nonsense... You..."

name: Takuji
message: "Did you hear that?"

name: Takuji
message: "Just now, this man called my thoughts 'religious nonsense.'"

name: Takuji
message: "As if to say I was a 'madman'."

name: Iida
message: "Th-That's wrong..."

name: Takuji
message: "Am I wrong? To ponder upon death... Has religion not advanced thought on mortality for the past several thousand years? Has metaphysics not?"

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, that which reeks of religion, the action of contemplating death, seems to him the action of a madman. Am I wrong?"

name: Iida
message: "You're wrong... You sound like a cultist..."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really? What a strange thing you've just said. What part of what I'm saying seems crazy to you?"

name: Iida
message: "I don't know, but..."

name: Takuji
message: "If you ask me, it seems like you have unfounded conviction for that dogma which you call common sense."

name: Iida
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Takuji
message: "You can't resist attaching the label 'crazy' to that which you cannot understand. You declare anything which would overthrow your common sense to be the words of a madman."

name: Iida
message: "Y-You're twisting my words... Mamiya, you..."

name: Iida
message: "Please. Someone call the homeroom teacher! Someone!"
He desperately appealed to the students, but not a single one moved...
Every person in that room was dominated by the atmosphere.

name: Takuji
message: "Modern society has reduced death to an abstraction. It is a society that views death as a taboo!"

name: Takuji
message: "The only ones who could speak of that as correct are slaves who have not even the capacity to think!"

name: Takuji
message: "In previous generations, death was the most important subject of philosophical thought, was it not?!"

name: Takuji
message: "Was death not the matter of utmost concern?!"

name: Takuji
message: "And despite that, modern governments and societies have treated it as if it were irrelevant to our lives."

name: Yuki
message: "Shut up!"

name: Yuki
message: "No one cares about that cryptic bullshit!"

name: Takuji
message: Cryptic bullshit?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's right. I don't know what you're talking about, and I don't think I want to, but I will say this."

name: Yuki
message: "You're labeling their deaths with your own selfish reasoning."

name: Takuji
message: "Selfish, you say?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's sophistry. It's complete nonsense!"

name: Yuki
message: "I've heard that theory about society covering up death before. Let's say you're right about that one. Even then, what you're saying about those two deaths signifying something is nothing but fabrication."

name: Yuki
message: "All you're doing is appealing to cognitive bias."

name: Takuji
message: "Bias?"

name: Yuki
message: "We just overestimate the frequency of events that affect us emotionally."

name: Yuki
message: "It's true, it is strange for two people to fall to their deaths in a row, but their deaths aren't related to anything else."

name: Yuki
message: "You're just trying to find meaning where there is none."

name: Takuji
message: "I expect no less from the person who has been gifted with knowledge and wisdom to match my own."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't need your compliments."

name: Takuji
message: "I suppose this is what you're trying to say. You want me to show you proof that the meaning I've claimed for their death is veracious."

name: Yuki
message: "Proof? Are you stupid? There's nothing you could show us that would prove that. After all, no matter how you look at it, you're just spouting nonsense!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm... Do you know how we differentiate between science and charlatanry?"

name: Yuki
message: "Science and charlatanry? That's..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes. How would one differentiate science from pseudoscience?"
She was silent.
Of course.
The problem of differentiating between science and pseudoscience still hasn't been completely solved.
It's still a fuzzy line, even to the experts.
Since she knows that, she has no choice but to be silent.
She's in a dilemma because she has as much knowledge and wisdom as I do.
It's annoying how idiots tend to make flippant remarks in situations like this.

name: Takuji
message: "The difference between science and pseudoscience lies in whether or not the theory makes novel predictions."

name: Yuki
message: "Novel predictions... I didn't think an idiot like you would know that phrase."

name: Takuji
message: "It's a principle proposed by Imre Lakatos. It can be used to determine whether a theory is scientific or pseudoscientific."

name: Yuki
message: "Kuhn's paradigm theory and Popper's Falsificationism. Lakatos built upon those to create his methodology of research, and then he derived his principle of novel predictions from that."

name: Takuji
message: "The word prediction sounds almost religious, doesn't it? To put it simply, a novel prediction is a truthful prediction that may appear strange to the layman, but can be derived from the theory."

name: Takuji
message: "In other words, if the predictions I make based on my theory, if those predictions come true, then my theory is correct."

name: Takuji
message: "The theory of relativity predicted many phenomena that were later demonstrated through experimentation. Therefore, the theory of relativity is correct."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So then, you're going to make some predictions?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes."

name: Takuji
message: "I shall now make several novel predictions."

name: Takuji
message: "And as they bear fruit, one by one, you will all quiver with fear."

name: Takuji
message: "My verity..."

name: Yuki
message: "Th-That's ridiculous..."
She spit those words at me and then looked away.
Utter defeat.
This is the difference between the savior and a perfect human.
Minakami Yuki and Tomosane Yuuki could never match me.
Both of them are just hurdles created by my mother. Even if they think themselves perfect, they can't hope to match me.
And the reason is because... I am the savior.

name: Takuji
message: "God sacrificed these two so that I could be reborn!"

name: Takuji
message: "The first was Shiroyama Tsubasa, and the second was Takashima Zakuro. God sacrificed them so that I could be reborn!"

name: Takuji
message: "I have been reborn!"

name: Takuji
message: "As what?"

name: Takuji
message: "The savior."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, as the savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "The world will end in five days."

name: Takuji
message: "But that is an omen of greater things."

name: Takuji
message: "An omen that the world will be reborn."

name: Takuji
message: "Those not saved, along with the old world, will fall into the depths of hell to suffer for eternity."

name: Takuji
message: "An eternity of torment!"

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone knows..."

name: Takuji
message: "That the world is pervaded by lies! That the truth is hidden!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish speak of equality!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the world is not equal!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish speak of freedom!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that there is no freedom in the world!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish speak of love!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that love is traitorous!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish say that you must not kill!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the world is brimming with murderers!"

name: Takuji
message: "The foolish say that you must not lie!"

name: Takuji
message: "But everyone knows that the foolish themselves are lying!"

name: Takuji
message: "Those who swallow the lies of the foolish make fools of themselves!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, their lies!"

name: Takuji
message: "They were all lies!"

name: Takuji
message: "That the world has always existed..."

name: Takuji
message: "And that the world will continue to exist forevermore!"

name: Takuji
message: "They are all lies!"

name: Takuji
message: "The path we walk leads to..."

name: Takuji
message: "The abyss!"

name: Takuji
message: "The world will end!"

name: Takuji
message: "It will surely end!"

name: Takuji
message: "This is the truth!"

name: Takuji
message: "As proof, I shall make three predictions."

name: Takuji
message: "Firstly! The thickness of death in the air will be affirmed with yet another death!"

name: Takuji
message: "Secondly! A large number of people will witness the death!"

name: Takuji
message: "Thirdly! The deceased will speak of..."

name: Takuji
message: "The ultimate demise!"
I dashed from the room.

name: Takuji
message: "Ha, ha, ha..."
Hehehe, their faces. What wonderful faces.
Numada's face, Nishimura's face...
The teacher's face...
The rest of the people in the class...
And Minakami Yuki's face...

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahahaha..."
Are those the faces of those who I once feared?
Hehehehehe, they're worthless.
They're truly worthless!

name: Takuji
message: "Ahahahahahahahaha!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's..."

name: Takuji
message: "Otonashi Ayana!"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll wipe that cool expression off your face soon enough!"

name: Ayana
message: "It's summer. It's not cool at all."

name: Takuji
message: "I can see through your bluff!"

name: Takuji
message: "Otonashi Ayana! You are nothing but Riruru-chan's dregs!"

name: Takuji
message: "You're just a shadow!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm not afraid of you!"

name: Ayana
message: "Like I said, I'm not scary. Actually, I'm super nice. I'm even famous for being nice to everyone."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't make fun of me!"

name: Takuji
message: "I am within the omen!"

name: Takuji
message: "And after the omen... I will reach fruition!"

name: Ayana
message: "That so? Keep at it, then."

name: Takuji
message: "Shut up! Don't make fun of me!"

name: Ayana
message: "I'm not making fun of you."

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun... Goodbye."

name: Ayana
message: "You're going to return the world to the sky, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Ugh!"

name: Takuji
message: "Aaaaagh..."

name: Takuji
message: "Ha, ha, ha..."

name: Takuji
message: "I am the omen."

name: Takuji
message: "Ha, ha, ha..."

name: Takuji
message: "I am the presentiment."

name: Takuji
message: "Ha, ha, ha..."

name: Takuji
message: "I am the apex of life... I am the apex..."

name: Takuji
message: "Ha, ha, ha..."

name: Takuji
message: "I... I am... the End Sky!"

name: Takuji
message: "Ha, ha, ha..."

name: Takuji
message: "Open sesame."

name: Takuji
message: "Who is it?!"

name: Takuji
message: "What are you doing?"
She was looking at me weird.
Her name is... Tachibana Kimika, I think?
The person who betrayed Takashima Zakuro.
Why is she here?

name: Takuji
message: "Are you looking for me, Tachibana Kimika-san?"

name: Kimika
message: "So you... know my name..."
I didn't really know her well.
Her face was in one of Takashima-san's pictures. That's all.

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, you're the one who betrayed Takashima-san, right?"
I thought she would flinch when I said that, but her expression didn't change at all.

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah, that's right. I betrayed Takashima Zakuro. I chased her to her death."
What is she holding?
She was hiding something in her right hand.

name: Takuji
message: "Why are you here?"

name: Kimika
message: "Well, you're the savior, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, and?"

name: Kimika
message: "I'm in the class next door, so I heard you shouting."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. And you couldn't help listening when you heard Takashima Zakuro's name?"

name: Kimika
message: "Something like that. I ran into the hall and listened. You're awfully popular. I wasn't the only one in the hall listening either. There were even a few teachers out there hanging on your every word."

name: Takuji
message: "What? Teachers?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yeah..."
So the teacher next door heard me hit Iida with a vase...
Why didn't he come stop me?

name: Takuji
message: "And? What were they doing?"

name: Kimika
message: "They were quivering. I could hear their teeth chattering."

name: Takuji
message: "They were quivering?"
Oh, I see.
So that teacher was...

name: Takuji
message: "That teacher must have been Senagawa."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"
From her surprised expression, I must have been right.

name: Takuji
message: "What is it?"

name: Kimika
message: "For all your confidence, you do still make mistakes."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Kimika
message: "It was Kiyokawa... Kiyokawa Asumi. She's your homeroom teacher, isn't she?"

name: Takuji
message: "It was Kiyokawa?"
Why would she be so scared? She's our homeroom teacher. I would've expected her to come stop me.
No, wait.
There was someone who registered with a referral from Senagawa.
I thought it was likely that the registration was from a teacher. If that was Kiyokawa, then it all makes sense.
Kiyokawa has been receiving the curse mail too. She was so scared that she didn't stop me.

name: Takuji
message: "Kiyokawa Asumi, huh? Did she do anything else?"

name: Kimika
message: "I couldn't hear her very well, but she was muttering something like, 'Y-Yui, is that true?'"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh really?"
And Yui is Senagawa's first name.
Those two are close enough to call each other by their first names.
Well, there aren't very many teachers around their age at this school. Most of the others are closing in on retirement.

name: Kimika
message: "B-But why did you think it was Senagawa?"
Just now...
Her voice cracked for a second.
She's upset.
There's no mistake... She's bluffing.
She's been acting confident this whole time, but she's quivering on the inside.
She definitely reacted when I said Senagawa's name.
Well, of course... She's the one who was posting so much about Takashima on the underground message board. She was clearly distraught about the curse.
"It really is a curse."
"At this rate, we're all going to die."
"These messages are really bizarre."
And so on... She sounded awfully upset in those posts...
Hehehe... She doesn't know I read all those posts she made. What a stupid girl.
Her bluffing is truly impertinent.

name: Takuji
message: "Do you want to know why I thought it was Senagawa?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes... Why Mrs. Senagawa?"
Her speech grew a little more polite.
I could see straight through her.
She must have been expecting me to say it was because Senagawa was in hot water for being the advisor to the Fine Arts Club where Takashima-san used to get bullied.
Almost everyone had heard that rumor.
She must have been expecting me to say something simple like that.
Hehehe... My next words...
I'll make you quiver in fear...
I'll expose your bluff, Tachibana Kimika.

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Why are you acting so high and mighty?"

name: Takuji
message: "High and mighty? Oh, I'm just worried you might be shocked to hear it."

name: Kimika
message: "Sh-Shocked...?"
What a face. Where did all your confidence go, Tachibana?

name: Takuji
message: Yeah... I was just wondering how you'd react when you heard Senagawa was going to die."
For some reason... her expression went blank for an instant.
Why? Why isn't she surprised?
Then, in the next instant...
Her expression froze for a second, then changed into a forced smile.
They say that when faced with true fear, a human's expression almost looks like they're laughing.
This unnatural laugh must mean that she's more scared than she's ever been in her life.

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Wh-Why will she die? When will she die?"

name: Takuji
message: "When? Pretty soon, I suppose."

name: Kimika
message: "D-D-Do you mean, like... today or tomorrow?"
Hold on... How scared are you? Where did your courage go?

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, something like that."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Why Mrs. Senagawa? Why is she going to die..."

name: Takuji
message: "The reason? There's only one reason, isn't there?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? D-Do you mean... Takashima Zakuro's curse?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's it."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-Then is anyone else going to die?"

name: Takuji
message: "At this rate, yeah..."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, I-I see. Others are going to die... Others are going to be killed."
Hehehehe... She's so scared. I can hear her voice shaking.

name: Kimika
message: "U-Um, I have another question... Why is Mrs. Senagawa going to die first?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because she was especially hated."

name: Kimika
message: "Ah!"
Her face distorted in a way I'd never seen before. This was almost a death sentence for her.
The four people most deserving of Takashima-san's hate would be Akasaka Megu, Kitami Satoko, Senagawa Yui... and Tachibana Kimika herself.

name: Kimika
message: "A-Ahaha... Mrs. Senagawa was especially hated."
What a smile. The fear is practically written on her face.
Is it that scary? Hehehehe...

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, and some others, like Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... The people who were involved in her bullying."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-Then I―"

name: Takuji
message: "Who knows... But you're not getting them, are you?"

name: Kimika
message: "Not getting them... You mean..."

name: Takuji
message: "There are two kinds of curse mail. One is the kind that is sent to everyone once a day to pronounce their deaths."

name: Takuji
message: "And the other is... messages full of hate that come every hour."

name: Kimika
message: "I haven't gotten any of those."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, I guess not."

name: Kimika
message: "What does that mean?"

name: Takuji
message: "I don't know whether any of you are getting the messages or not, but I can see the curse."

name: Kimika
message: "Y-You can see the curse?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, I can see the hate swirling around people's bodies..."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-Then... what about me?"

name: Takuji
message: "I wish I could say there's nothing, but your curse is as strong as Kitami and Satoko's."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-Then why am I not getting the other kind of curse mail?"

name: Takuji
message: "Maybe she sympathizes with you."

name: Kimika
message: "S-Sympathizes?"

name: Takuji
message: "You were bullied for a long time, just like her..."
For some reason, her expression went blank again.
She doesn't react like most people.

name: Kimika
message: "So... will Akasaka and Kitami die too?"

name: Takuji
message: "At this rate..."

name: Kimika
message: "What do you mean? Can you stop the curse?"

name: Takuji
message: "Who knows... I'm not sure."

name: Kimika
message: "Can you stop it?"
Her tone changed again.
She doesn't react normally at all.

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, of course."

name: Kimika
message: "Then you can stop Mrs. Senagawa's curse too."

name: Takuji
message: "I could, but..."

name: Kimika
message: "But?"

name: Takuji
message: "I won't."

name: Kimika
message: "Why would that be?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's what the world has determined. It's been determined that Senagawa Yui will die."

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, really. She's fated to die? Then what about Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko?"

name: Kimika
message: "And... what about me?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... Who knows? I can't tell you that."

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm... Oh really? Now that you mention it, I do remember you saying that you would only save those who came to pray at your feet."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. I don't have any obligation to save everyone, and I would be going against God's plan if I did."

name: Kimika
message: "Hmm, I see. But to put it another way, anyone who bowed to you could be saved?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right."

name: Kimika
message: "Will you save me?"
Just a moment. For some reason, her face changed back into its original expression for just a moment.
Rather than fear, it looked more like...
Intent to kill?

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehehe... my savior."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Kimika
message: "Would you take me as your humble servant?"

name: Takuji
message: "You mean you want to join me?"

name: Kimika
message: "Yes. I'm scared that I might be killed by Takashima-san's curse... I don't want to die."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm."
Oh, is that it...
I mistook it for intent to kill, but it was the expression of a hunter that's found its prey.
She was hunting for a way to save herself, and she found it.
I guess she's just an animal looking to save itself.
She acted like she knew something important, but she was just motivated by self-preservation.
She's the embodiment of a simple, predictable woman.

name: Kimika
message: "I-I'll do anything to be saved. Please save me!"
Her attitude changed completely. Now she's begging me for salvation... How pathetic.

name: Takuji
message: "Do you want to be saved that badly?"

name: Kimika
message: "Y-Yes. Please save me, my savior! Y-You're the only one who can stop Takashima Zakuro's curse."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, of course."

name: Kimika
message: "Please, allow me to be your servant. I'll do anything. I'll do anything, so please..."

name: Takuji
message: "Did you just come here to escape the curse?"

name: Kimika
message: "U-Uh... I... I'll do anything. My faith may still be lacking, but I'll listen to whatever you say!"

name: Takuji
message: "Alright. You're welcome at my side."

name: Kimika
message: "Eh? R-Really?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah... It's pre-established harmony. It's because of the fate my mother has determined for me that you are here."

name: Kimika
message: "Pre-established harmony?"

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-What's that?"

name: Takuji
message: "Everything is inevitable. Takashima didn't kill you because she needed you to do something."

name: Kimika
message: "She needed me to do something?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. She needs you to spread her predictions to more people."

name: Kimika
message: "Predictions? The prediction that the world will end on the 20th?"

name: Takuji
message: "Exactly... The 20th is the world's last day."

name: Kimika
message: "Wh-Why me?"

name: Takuji
message: "Love and hate are two sides of the same coin. Takashima resented you, but she also loved you. She wanted you to save everyone."

name: Kimika
message: "Wanted me to save..."

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro wanted me to..."

name: Takuji
message: "She was that kind of person. She was honest, kind, and pure."

name: Takuji
message: "She died in your place!"

name: Kimika
message: "In my place?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes... She died so that she could warn everyone of the world's destruction on the 20th."

name: Takuji
message: "And why?"

name: Takuji
message: "Why did Takashima Zakuro die?!"

name: Takuji
message: "BECAUSE IT WAS NECESSARY!"

name: Kimika
message: "Necessary?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. She needed to become a ghost in order to save you."

name: Takuji
message: "She needed to become a spirit so she could know the future."

name: Takuji
message: "And the reason you are still alive is so you can tell the people! You need to tell the people what Takashima knew!"

name: Kimika
message: "I need to... tell the people what Zakuro knew..."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. Takashima Zakuro entrusted it to you."

name: Kimika
message: "Entrusted... it?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, she trusted that you would come to me and save the world."

name: Kimika
message: "That I would..."

name: Takuji
message: "One must know pain themselves before they can understand the pain of others."

name: Kimika
message: "The pain of others..."

name: Takuji
message: "That's why people who haven't known pain themselves can so easily hurt the people around them."

name: Kimika
message: "Th-That's..."

name: Takuji
message: "Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko are perfect examples of that, but you're different. You know pain."

name: Takuji
message: "Right now, you're the person who understands Takashima Zakuro's pain more than any other!"

name: Takuji
message: "Is there anyone who understands Takashima Zakuro's pain better than you do? Is there anyone who understands Takashima Zakuro's feelings better than you do?"

name: Kimika
message: "No... There's no one. I was her friend, and she saved me. Then, despite my love for her, I betrayed her... and, and..."

name: Takuji
message: "I understand. I understand what you're saying."

name: Takuji
message: "Don't say anything more. Takashima understands..."

name: Kimika
message: "Mamiya... sama..."

name: Takuji
message: "Until now, you thought you were worth less than the worms underfoot."

name: Takuji
message: "You thought your existence had no value."

name: Takuji
message: "You associated with the bitches, the whores, and the worms, and you were scorned."

name: Takuji
message: "You thought you had no value."

name: Takuji
message: "And after you betrayed the friend who saved you, what value did your existence have?"

name: Takuji
message: "But you were wrong!"

name: Takuji
message: "You have value! You have a reason to exist! That's why Takashima died in your place!"

name: Kimika
message: "Ah, my savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "There is a reason for your existence."

name: Takuji
message: "Be relieved, Tachibana Kimika. You were right to come to me. This too was a result of Takashima-san's guidance."

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro's?"

name: Takuji
message: "Before her death, she was my servant. She was of great use to me."

name: Kimika
message: "Zakuro was?"

name: Takuji
message: "Well, I wasn't yet the savior at the time, so I guess you could say we were dating."
Though I guess it was just her unrequited love for me... I never really realized the truth at the time.

name: Takuji
message: "She died so that I could be awakened as the savior."

name: Takuji
message: "The truth is, she died for me."

name: Takuji
message: "She knew everything. That's why she kept it a secret from me, her lover, that she was going to die."

name: Takuji
message: "So that I could awaken as the savior..."

name: Kimika
message: "My savior, you were dating Zakuro?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, it seems she loved me... though I wasn't able to respond to her feelings very well."

name: Kimika
message: "The person Zakuro loved. You're... Zakuro's savior."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes. I was a savior to Takashima Zakuro as well."

name: Takuji
message: "Senagawa Yui... You know who she is."

name: Kimika
message: "Yes!"

name: Takuji
message: "Takashima Zakuro resents Senagawa Yui more than Akasaka Megu or Kitami Satoko."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, right... Takashima Zakuro might make peace with those two. I could help them."

name: Kimika
message: "Help them?"

name: Takuji
message: "I intend to help them attain Takashima-san's forgiveness."

name: Kimika
message: "C-Can you really do that?"

name: Takuji
message: "Of course I can. Who do you think I am?"

name: Kimika
message: "Oh, s-sorry."

name: Takuji
message: "Anyway, they may make peace with Takashima."

name: Takuji
message: "But Senagawa is different."

name: Kimika
message: "Mrs. Senagawa is... different?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes. Takashima resents the fact that a teacher allowed the bullying to happen."

name: Kimika
message: "I guess she did."

name: Kimika
message: "She knew, but she didn't want to bother with it."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right."

name: Takuji
message: "Watch her movements."

name: Kimika
message: "Movements?"

name: Takuji
message: "She will die tomorrow."

name: Kimika
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "She will die from Takashima Zakuro's curse."

name: Kimika
message: "Mrs. Senagawa will die from Zakuro's curse."

name: Kimika
message: "Die from... Zakuro's curse..."

name: Kimika
message: "Hehehehe... Die, die, die. Senagawa is going to die!"

name: Kimika
message: "Killed by Zakuro..."

name: Kimika
message: "Killed..."
Maybe I scared her too much... Her emotions are a wreck. Her face looks like she's lost in ecstasy.
I have to be careful. If I scare humans too much, they might break.

name: Takuji
message: "Tachibana... Are you all right?"

name: Kimika
message: "Eh?
Yes."

name: Takuji
message: "She will die tomorrow."

name: Kimika
message: "Tomorrow. Got it."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, and I need you to watch her movements until then."

name: Kimika
message: "Surveillance until she dies?"

name: Takuji
message: "No, you can stop at the end. It would be hard on you to watch a person die."

name: Kimika
message: "Not at all... I'm fine."
She was so emotional before, but then she accepted that someone was going to die without even blinking.
Does this girl have a screw loose?
Or...

name: Kimika
message: "I'll do anything... if it helps you, my savior."
I see. So that's why...
The reason she accepts it so easily. She's like a well trained soldier, or a cultist.
Tachibana Kimika... She could be useful.

name: Takuji
message: "All right, then. I'll entrust you with this mission."

name: Kimika
message: "Understood. I won't let you down."

name: Takuji
message: "From now on, message me and tell me about all her movements. No matter how irrelevant it may seem, report everything you notice to me."

name: Kimika
message: "Understood!"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... I'm putting my trust in you."

name: Takuji
message: "My... servant."

name: Kimika
message: "I will perform my duty!"
She could be a useful tool.
Suddenly obtaining a loyal servant like this must have been predetermined.
Hehehe... This is great.
My mother was so kind.
I didn't expect her to arrange this.
Jesus Christ's meeting with the apostles could only be called fate.
It could be called a necessary coincidence for the savior.
The first disciple...
Tachibana Kimika.
The woman who betrayed Takashima Zakuro.
Though I thought she was hiding something in her right hand at first... I guess it was just my imagination.
Hehehe... I was too suspicious of her.
Something like this...
I convinced myself as I sat in front of my computer.
from: Takashima Zakuro
subject: no subject
you definitely saw it
but you didn't do anything
you knew
but you pretended like you didn't
This would be the first message.
One hour later, this would be sent.
from: Takashima Zakuro
subject: no subject
you knew they were always bullying me
on the roof of building c
they borrowed the key from you after all
Hehehe... Isn't this a masterpiece?
This one doesn't just say 'it hurts, it hurts'.
This one is only being sent to Senagawa.
I won't send this one to Akasaka Megu or Kitami Satoko.
It's curse mail just for that teacher.
Hehehehe... She'll know fear like she's never known before.
I've already written all the curse mail I'll need to make her into a sacrifice.
But I'll need to do some fine tuning to corner her.
I have a person reporting her every move.
In that way, Tachibana Kimika became my loyal servant at the perfect time.
I made her watch Senagawa and report her every move... I'll use every message from her to fine tune the contents of the curse mail.
I'll lead her to her demise.
A sacrifice so that I may become the savior.

name: Takuji
message: "Now then..."
Next is the question of what to do with Akasaka Megu and Kitami Satoko.
I'll give them the opposite of what I gave Senagawa.
For Senagawa, death. For those two, salvation.
That should be an appropriate miracle for me to show the masses.

name: Takuji
message: "And for that..."
First, I have to fish them out.
If I don't cast my line, I won't be able to catch any fish.
I would've never done this before.
I started a thread on the SAWAYAKA message board with my own name.
1: Who shall be saved and who shall not
1: Mamiya Takuji: 2012/07/15(W) 11:23:12 ID:mamiya
Many of you have confirmed it.
Many of you have seen it.
Takashima's message predicted my awakening.
I am standing here now.
As the savior.
Now it is time to determine who will be saved and who will not.
People started replying right after I posted the thread.
Of course... Their hearts are thick with fear.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... They're mocking me. Are you all that scared?"
The thread grew incredibly quickly.
Now I just had to wait for the most fearful person of all to post.
They'll definitely fall into this thread's trap.
They're the ones who most desire to be saved from this situation.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Let the game begin."

name: Takuji
message: "You can only dance in the palm of my hand."
I don't feel the passage of time when I'm in my underground base.
Like the concept of time doesn't even exist.
Here, only my phone and my computer clock remember the time.

name: Takuji
message: "Just before nine o'clock, huh?"
Quite a lot of time has passed since sunset. I haven't talked to Riruru-chan today.

name: Takuji
message: "Because there's no need."
If it's all been predetermined, there's a reason why my angel hasn't come to talk to me.
Some reason...

name: Takuji
message: "A reason, huh?"
I gazed at the icon drawn on the wall.
It was a sacred image of an angel drawn by the savior.
So that picture had power beyond comprehension.

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru... chan..."
I held her in mind...
And sent her a Holy Surge.
Yes, this is the line of communication that connects the savior to the angels...

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "R-Riruru-chan?"

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say?"

name: Takuji
message: "What... It feels like..."
What is this? Riruru-chan feels different somehow...
This feeling is...
Unease?
No...
This is...
Fear.
Why?
Why would I fear Riruru-chan?
That's strange.
This is definitely strange.

name: Takuji
message: "But still..."
This feeling reminds me of something.
This feeling reminds me of... That's it!

name: Takuji
message: "Otonashi Ayana!"
That' it. It reminds me of the feeling when I'm talking to Otonashi.
It's close to that feeling. Even after becoming the savior, I still loathe it.
But...
This is Riruru-chan...
I'm not sure, but...
This isn't Otonashi.
Why?
Why do I feel like this?
And...
Something feels different.

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Takuji
message: "Save you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Save you from what?"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh? The roof..."

name: Takuji
message: "Go to the roof?"

name: Takuji
message: "Something outside?"

name: Takuji
message: "What's outside?"

name: Takuji
message: "The world?"

name: Takuji
message: "What about the world?"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "What is this..."
There was no doubt.
Something about her was different from normal.
Riruru-chan felt different somehow. No, I could still feel the old Riruru-chan.

name: Takuji
message: "An impurity?"
A foreign substance... like white and black were mixing.
Like the white and black were trying to devour each other.

name: Takuji
message: "What's happening?"

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... I guess it's futile trying to figure it out."
It's all been predetermined.
There's always some important meaning behind my actions.

name: Takuji
message: "Go to the roof..."
There must be something important there.
That's what God whispered to me.
So I headed to the roof.
What's that?
Something was looking at me from the bottom of the pool.

name: Takuji
message: "Why are you looking at me?
A pool without water.
I should have been able to see the bottom of the pool, but it had transformed into an abyss.
Something was sticking its long neck out of the abyss and looking at me.
Looking at the world from within the abyss.

name: Takuji
message: "What is it, people of the abyss? Is it that rare to see a human savior?"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, you can't talk?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe..."
The people with long necks opened their mouths.
Within their mouths, there was neither tongue nor tooth.
There was just another abyss.
A long neck that stretched into the endless abyss.

name: Takuji
message: "Why are you looking at me?"
Because the end of the world is fast approaching.
No, there's something else.
I looked up at the school roof.
The air above the school was distorted.

name: Takuji
message: "This is the feeling of... a shadow?"

name: Takuji
message: "The shadow when something passes through."
Just like when a three dimensional object passes through a two dimensional plane... Something from a higher dimension is passing above the school.
It was revolving and changing shape like a polychoron... Like a four dimensional cube.

name: Takuji
message: "Something is coming."
Something was coming to the rooftop.
It was... a strange shadow.
It looked like a warped statue.
Some unknown existence was pointing at the school building.

name: Takuji
message: "I know what this is."
It was indicating a route to the rooftop.
Like a road sign.
But I knew the way even without it.
The way I must go.

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, look at this."

name: Takuji
message: "Thank you for your attention."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Takuji
message: "Ahahahahaha, of course not."

name: Takuji
message: "A corpse?"

name: Takuji
message: "Whose?"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, Shiroyama's."

name: Takuji
message: "What about it?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm?"

name: Takuji
message: "Give you his corpse?"

name: Takuji
message: "What are you going to do with it?"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Ahahahaha, what's up with that?"

name: Takuji
message: "For the record, you're one of those, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahaha, yeah, but you guys really are low dimensionals."

name: Takuji
message: "You're no better than any of the people who go to this school."

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Takuji
message: "His corpse is?"

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, really... I see."

name: Takuji
message: "But still, even if he's dead, I don't know if he'll listen to me."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, I'll tell him if I see him."

name: Takuji
message: "That you guys wanted him."

name: Takuji
message: "No, no, you don't need to thank me."

name: Takuji
message: "Ahahaha, you can't have my body."

name: Takuji
message: "Besides, the savior's body is too big for you. It's so big you would just get lost inside it."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's right. For all eternity..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehe... You're pretty funny. I like you."

name: Takuji
message: "Ahahahaha, well then, I'll see you later."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, someone's there."

name: Takuji
message: "Not a human, huh..."

name: Takuji
message: "They're coming toward me."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, look, if it isn't Shiroyama-kun..."

name: Takuji
message: "The guys I met earlier said you were walking around, but I didn't believe them."

name: Takuji
message: "I thought you were already cremated and in the ground."

name: Takuji
message: "Where did you wander in from?"

name: Takuji
message: "Or did no one clean up your body?"

name: Takuji
message: "The janitor is awfully lazy, then..."

name: Takuji
message: "Well, the school lets bullying happen, so I shouldn't be surprised they would forget to clean up a corpse."
If they would let a person be bullied to death, it's not surprising that they'd leave a dead body laying around.

name: Takuji
message: "But doesn't a walking corpse pose a hygiene problem?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... You smell awful."

name: Takuji
message: "I hated you when you were alive, but you're even worse when you're dead."

name: Takuji
message: "They say even death can't cure an idiot, but in your case I guess it would be that death can't cure an asshole."

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, it is."

name: Takuji
message: "Look, it's about time."

name: Takuji
message: "They were looking for you."

name: Takuji
message: "Look, over there."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, you'll be eaten."

name: Takuji
message: "I don't know. I don't hang out with them."

name: Takuji
message: "No way... I can't do that..."

name: Takuji
message: "Well then, I'll be going..."

name: Takuji
message: "Have fun. The people from the abyss were looking for you. You're a popular guy."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Are you scared?"

name: Takuji
message: "Your head jiggles when you're scared? That's a funny way of expressing yourself."
I went up the stairs.
The stairs to the roof.
The road to the sky.
I ascended.

name: Takuji
message: "This is the roof..."

name: Takuji
message: "Directly beneath the sky..."
The sky was lit up for a moment.
Light shone out from in between the thick, dark clouds.

name: Takuji
message: "Lightning..."

name: Takuji
message: "Thunder..."
The dark sky was bathed in a blue light.
The pitch black world was dyed blue for an instant.
The lightning was coming closer. The time between the lightning and the thunder was shorter that time.

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, it's going to rain."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?!"

name: Takuji
message: "...What was that?"
I saw countless shapes in the sky illuminated by the lightning, but I couldn't tell what they were.
They were like...

name: Takuji
message: "A flock of birds at a time like this?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's..."
This time, the lightning illuminated far more flying shadows than before.
They looked just like...

name: Takuji
message: "...A massive swarm of locusts."
I'd seen them on TV before.
The sky was covered with flying shadows.
More shadow than sky...
It was a picture of a massive swarm of locusts that had mutated from solitary to gregarious locusts, forming a terrifying mass of insects.

name: Takuji
message: "Ah... This is bad."
This is bad.
That thought instantly filled my mind.
Because I realized that the next peal of thunder would be the seventh. The seventh peal of thunder is the signal.
The signal for the final battle in the Book of Revelation... The seven bowls are poured out and disaster flows into the world.

name: Takuji
message: "This is―"
The flying shadows covered the sky.
With their great wings, they looked like a massive swarm of locusts. No, a massive army of...

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan..."

name: Takuji
message: "What's happening?"

name: Takuji
message: "What is this? This is bad..."

name: Takuji
message: "This is... far beyond the comprehension of humans."

name: Takuji
message: "This is... the final battle of the gods."

name: Takuji
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "Aagh!"

name: Takuji
message: "What is this..."
A sound like locusts flapping their wings.
No, is this the sound of their voices?
Riruru-chan's howling voice?
Tekeli-li-li... That strange sound echoed through the sky.
A mental counter-current.
Inversion of information.
The shadow of a higher dimension.
Shadow, shadow, shadow.
The light of a higher dimension.
Light, light, light.
Mother.
Mother train.
My mother's bundle.
My mother pitching a second game.

name: Takuji
message: "What... What is this?"

name: Takuji
message: "What... What's happening?"
My head...
I was terribly confused.
The final battle of the gods was happening right above my head.
It was a battle between mirrored existences.
Opposite aspects that can never mix.
Those aspects were angels and demons.
Or the light and the darkness.
Purity and filth.
Good and evil.
An instant and all eternity.
Anode and cathode.
Benign and harmful.
Heaven and hell.
Benevolence and malevolence.
Abasement and hypocrisy.
Intelligence and feeblemindedness.
Expansion and contraction.
The living and the dead.
Obligation and resent.
Order and chaos.
Humility and pride.
The previous world and the next.
Silence and clatter.
Improvement and deterioration.
As well as fiction and reality.
Real and fake.
Dream and nightmare.
Order and chaos.
Concrete and abstract.
Organized and disorganized.
A confrontation of all things.
The end of all things.
All that is true and all that is fake.
Words.
Words.
Proposition.
Thousands, millions, billions... An innumerable number of black wings and white wings.
The sky was covered with their beating wings.
White and black in stillness.
An ordered pattern of white and black.
Then the silence turned into a great tumult.
It changed into a chaotic mix of white and black.
Apocalypse.
The battle between the light and darkness that divide the world finally began.
Two giant snakes entangled within each other.
They wrestled in the sky.
The entrails of angels.
Feathers flying.
Crushed wings.
Falling angels.
The ground, covered in angels.
White angels.
Black angels.
My mother's words.
God's menstruation.
The voice of heaven.
Impregnation.
Semen.

name: Riruru
message: "Save me, Takuji-kun!"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"
A white Riruru begged me for help.
I didn't know what to do.

name: Riruru
message: "No! Don't let yourself be taken in!"
A white Riruru rebuked me.
I didn't know what to do.
The world was drenched with the angels' voices.
The sky was full of wings.
The angels fell like rain.
Limbs.
Entrails.
Eyes.
A white Riruru dragged out a black Riruru's entrails.

name: Riruru
message: "Aaaaaaaaah! It hurts!!"
The black Riruru cried it out in pain.
Then the white Riruru pulled out her entrails.
She begged me for help.
IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS IT HURTS SAVE ME.
I didn't know what to do.
A black Riruru used her sword to cut another white Riruru's intestines out.

name: Riruru
message: "It hurts so bad..."
Then the sword was pulled out, pulling the white Riruru's intestines along with it.

name: Riruru
message: "Ha, haaaaa... Aaaaah..."
She groaned in despair as she looked at her own guts strewn out before her.
Two angels lost their ability to fly.
The girl with white wings and the girl with black wings...
They grappled with each other as they fell to the earth.
Their hands were clasped, and their intestines entwined as they fell to the earth.
They looked as if they were dancing with each other.
A beautiful pair of angels.
Hands clasped, kissing, with entrails entwined as they fell, fell, fell out of the sky.
They held each other's hands, and then crashed into the ground.
Clumps of flesh rained down.
Almost like hail...
Crashed into the ground.
Blood rained down.
Almost like rain...
They drenched the earth.
The swarm of Rirurus blotted out the sky... Thousands, millions, billions of dead angels.
The corpses came down like rain.
Their bodies burst upon impact with the earth...

name: Riruru
message: "Why won't you save us?! You're supposed to save the world!"

name: Riruru
message: "No! Accept reality! Don't run away! Don't run away!"

name: Riruru
message: "You're the savior, aren't you?! Why won't you lend us your power?!"

name: Riruru
message: "Leave! You should have never come here!"
I stood in the midst of their innumerable voices and did nothing.
I stood in the rain of corpses and did nothing.
The swarm of Rirurus filled the sky. No, the universe.
The sun danced on the tip of White Riruru's tongue.
The moon kicked in Black Riruru's womb.
In Scorpius, Antares shined red with blood.
At a white Riruru's urging... Antares shone dark red and instantly disintegrated millions of black Rirurus.
Thunder and lightning.
The awakening of an angel.
The flapping of a demon's wings.
The despair of the stars.
What I must do...
I hesitated.
I was frozen in that spot.
I froze before the battle of the gods.
I froze.
What could a human like me do in the final battle?
Before I realized it, the battle of the angels had ended.
The final battle of the angels ended in an instant.
There were puddles of blood on the school rooftop where the angels fell.
Like a puddle bathed in the red of the setting sun.
The puddles reflected the sky in shades of red.
The battle of the angels ended.
The opposing swarms of white and black angels.
There was no resolution... It ended with mutual destruction.
Even after billions of them died, nothing changed. Nothing was accomplished.
The white angels and the black angels.
They all just ate away at each other, destroyed each other, and disappeared.

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan..."
There was no answer.
Of the billions of Riruru-chans that blotted out the sky, not one survived.

name: Takuji
message: "Ah... That's right."
That's right... I have to think...

name: Takuji
message: "I... have to do what I can..."
The battle of the gods occurred in the heavens.
A battle that divided the universe.
As a mere human, there was nothing I could do.
So now I have to do what I can.
I should do what I can.
I gathered up the pieces of Riruru-chan that were strewn around the rooftop.
I picked up the chunks of flesh that went flying when she collided with the ground.
I should make her anew.
I picked up the pieces of her laying around so that I could restore her to normal.
I have to pick up her pieces.
The first thing I found was a right hand.
Now that I think of it, I think she actually was looking for her right hand... But I can't do anything with just a hand.
I found her right arm and right shoulder.
I put her right hand in place... She can use her right hand to grasp what she wants.
Though she probably isn't in the right state of mind to want much of anything right now.
That's it.
I need to find her brain so she can think again.
I walked around the rooftop, gathering pieces of Riruru-chan.
I don't know the details about all the different pieces of her guts though.
For instance, I have no idea where to put the pancreas. I don't know the exact details. Nevertheless, I clumsily put her back together.
It was like putting together a puzzle.
If there's a place where it fits, a piece has value.
But if there's nowhere it fits, the piece is worthless... Those are just chunks of flesh.
I gathered pieces of her that fit.
I gathered the ones that fit.
There were a lot of pieces that I didn't need.
Pieces that didn't go anywhere.
Pieces that didn't fit.
There were lots of them.

name: Takuji
message: "This is hard..."
It made me appreciate the work God did when he first made humans.
It's really hard to make life... and I already had all the pieces.
...That's what I thought about while I gathered the pieces of Riruru-chan.
I looked for an eyeball.
No, I already have a right eye.
A left eyeball... They look the same, but there's a difference between the left and right eyeballs.
An asymmetrical body.
I tried to adjust it until it looked right...

name: Takuji
message: "It looks really grotesque."
I created a single Riruru-chan from the pieces of several others.
The parts should have been the same, but I couldn't quite make it look right.
The lump of flesh started to look stranger and stranger as I put her together.
Why...
It hardly looked like my cute Riruru-chan at all.
I knew what it should look like in my head, but I couldn't seem to put it together right.
How did it turn into such a strange, warped thing?
I had the perfect image of a beautiful girl in my head, but what my hands actually made didn't look like her at all. It looked like a creepy statue.

name: Takuji
message: "This is wrong... Wrong... This isn't how it's supposed to look. Riruru-chan was more like... this. Aah, that's wrong, wrong, wrong!"
Every time I touched her, she got uglier.
She diverged more and more from the picture in my head.
Aagh... It's all wrong...
She almost looked like...
The scribble on the wall...
The kind of childish picture some teenager would post on the Internet.
No one would think... this lump of flesh is cute.

name: Takuji
message: "I have to try harder."
I did what I could.
What I can do... What I need to do right now.

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, this is bad... It's getting late."
I looked at the clock... It was past 11.
I had to hurry up.
The day was about to end.

name: Takuji
message: "I have to... I have to do what I can."
I descended the stairs... holding the grotesquely completed Riruru-chan.
Her warped body seemed to be moving ever so slightly, but I ignored it.
There were lots of things I had to do.
I quickly went to my base... There are a lot of things I still have to do on Earth.
The roof is the domain of the gods.
That's not a place for humans.
So I descended to the earth... I went to the world of humans...
I slipped into the human world.
Words.
Human words.
I slipped into the sea of words.
The world is everything that is the case.
The world is the totality of facts, not of things.
That which is the case... That which is not the case...
The world is determined by the facts, and by these being all the facts.
I descended into that world.
I returned to my room in my secret base.
I turned on my computer and dived into the sea of human words. Human words, words, words...
I entered that sea.

name: Takuji
message: "Ah... Oh right..."
I had to check the SAWAYAKA message board.
That was the first thing I had to do.
Since I'm the administrator of this site, I had to check that group of words first.
I had to administrate that group of words where everyone wears the same expression.
Anxiety.
And...
Anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety anxiety.
There is no such thing as creative anxiety.
Anxiety always looks the same.
No originality.
Anxiety wears a banal guise.

name: Takuji
message: "You're all just repeating the same words... You disappoint me."
I watched this group of words that did nothing but copy each other and thought of what I could do.
What can I do to this group of words?
I can't participate in a battle that divides the universe.
I can't call the thunder or the lightning. I can't devour the sun, and I can't plead with the star Antares.
I can't do anything to a swarm of angels.
But here...
The words here are a group of people.
There's something I must do to this group of people.
There's something I must do.
Because I am the savior.

name: Takuji
message: "Something I can do as the savior..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll tell you all a fairy tale."
What I can do is lead this poor flock of sheep.
Out of the dangerous forest... into the safe plains.
That's what I can do.

name: Takuji
message: "I'll heal your wounds."

name: Takuji
message: "What I can do... is save you all."
I am the human's savior.
I was born into this world so that I could save people.
1: Who shall be saved and who shall not
Can you prove you're the savior?
If you're the savior, then you should be able to stop Takashima's curse.
357: Akasaka Megu: 2012/07/15(W) 23:15:40 ID:megu
It's not hard to say all these things.
Stop Takashima's messages.

name: Takuji
message: "Hook, line, and sinker..."
The trap I set a few hours before had caught something.
But I couldn't relax just yet.
Game that has been caught in a trap may be weaker, but its mind is as alert as it can be.
If I'm not careful when I open the trap, I might be the one that gets eaten.
Calm down... Chase your desperate prey...
Accurately, perfectly, logically, analytically.
430: Mamiya Takuji: 2012/07/16(Th) 01:33:32 ID:mamiya
Stop Takashima's curse?
What do you mean?
I think her future messages will prove useful, don't you?
432: Akasaka Megu: 2012/07/16(Th) 01:36:20 ID:megu
The ones that are just coming to me and Satoko.
Those messages are nothing but scary. Stop those.
We're getting those messages every hour.
How selfish...
Though I don't care to say that anymore.
Why would I be annoyed that the lowest of lifeforms is the lowest of lifeforms?
People hate cockroaches, but no one is surprised that a cockroach is detestable.
I pulled out the piece of Takashima-san's skull that had been in her phone.
For an exorcism... this piece of skull would be the perfect way to summon a ghost.

name: Takuji
message: "And the location of the exorcism... would of course be that place. The building where Takashima-san jumped to her death."

447: Akasaka Megu: 2012/07/16(Th) 01:40:40 ID:megu
Don't screw with me. There's no way I can go there.

Her curse will kill me.
453: Mamiya Takuji: 2012/07/16(Th) 01:43:32 ID:mamiya
In the end, you are the ones who will have to decide if you want to go.
If you're right about being killed, won't the same thing eventually happen if you don't go?
There is a lock of hair at the place where she died.
Pick it up and bring it home.

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... I'll show you a miracle. I can stop her curse."
I got ready to go to Suginomiya.
I should be able to get there in a few minutes with my bicycle.
I have to place this before Akasaka or Kitami get there.
Then a miracle will occur.

name: Takuji
message: "That's right."
I'll do what I can...
I'll heal their wounds...
I'll lead the sheep out of the forest...
That's the job given to the savior of humans.
It's what I can do.
